title: About Home Herringbone Cotton Blanket Throw, Settee Cover (BEIGE/Natural, 70"x100")
features: This contemporary Herringbone designed throw, constructed with cotton will provide plenty of warmth and good looks
Suitable for all generations, from the young to the more mature, with its delicate shades enhancing the depth and detail of the herringbone design
This durable, woven cotton Throw is great for indoor or outdoor use. The cotton blanket is versatile with a delicate herringbone design with fringes
It does not only brighten up your interior but also protects furniture from dust, dirt and animal hair and it is easy to clean as well
Chill out at home with this herringbone cotton throw blanket, it is super comfy and will keep you warm when you are all curled up in your sofa
description: Product Description HERRINGBONE COTTON THROWS, MANY COLORS , 5 SIZES Herringbone cotton throws in many colors and sizes. QUEEN, KING and SUPER KING sizes also available These cotton-rich thick heavy throws are available in many sizes and colors. colors are BEIGE, BLACK, CHARCOAL, SILVER, RED, PINK, PEACH, MAROON, CHOCOLATE, GREEN, SAGE GREEN, MUSTARD, BLUE, TEAL. Sizes available are; 50x60", 70x100", 90x100", 102x102", 102x155" HERRINGBONE Cotton throws New modern colors Some of the new and modern colors. Chair throws Also in single chair sizes in all colors. Above & many more colors All throws with same color fringes. Have a close look Available in extra large sizes of 102x102" & 102x155" cotton throws Check out available new and modern colors & sizes Extra large settee covers available ALL new modern colors and sizes are available. Useful Decorative cotton throw. thick and large cotton blanket, protects your sofa bed from dirt, stains, wear & tear, pets and kids multi use, indoor, camping, TV blanket, evening blanket, furniture protector hand or machine wash.
